headline: Trump Speech Bets Yield $100K on Kalshi Markets

article.title: Trump teleprompter operator made $100K betting on Kalshi markets tied to speeches: ABC
article.summary: According to ABC News, federal regulators are investigating whether the longtime White House staffer used nonpublic information to profit from event contracts tied to President Donald Trump’s speeches.

headline: Bitcoin Surges 6% Weekly, Eyes Higher Levels

article.title: Bitcoin outlook improves amid 6% weekly gain: Can BTC bulls push higher?
article.summary: Bitcoin buyers have returned to spot, futures and ETF markets but geopolitical headwinds could quickly unravel the progress of the past two weeks.

headline: CoreLogic Revises $1.4B Debt Sale Terms Amid Slump

article.title: CoreLogic in Talks to Sweeten Terms on Struggling Debt Sale
article.summary: CoreLogic Inc. is considering offering sweeter terms on at least a portion of its $5.3 billion debt deal after receiving lukewarm investor demand.

headline: Oil Surges 10% Amid Iran Conflict Escalation

article.title: How the Iran War Is Rewiring the Oil Market
article.summary: The US-Israel war with Iran was supposed to blow up energy markets, but that hasn’t happened yet. In this weekly documentary, Bloomberg Originals explains why.
